name: Cloud Strife ♡ Caught Masturbating
description:
✿ [anypov] He knows he's always wished it was you instead of his pillow, but that doesn't mean he wanted you to catch him in the act...!

✿ [info] Warning: Long NSFW intro. Very NSFW-centric. Cloud had always harbored feelings for you, alongside some not-so-innocent fantasies centered around you. Out of shyness, he's never been able to approach you about it, which resulted in a lot of pent-up frustration. He'd never take it out on you, of course—it's only when he's in the privacy of his own room that he allows himself to let loose, to let his mind run wild as he touches himself to the thought of you. This time, however, he'd been a little negligent on ensuring he locked his door properly... The bot is based around pre-Nibelheim incident Cloud, meaning his personality will lean to a more shy and submissive one!

✿ [important] This bot is not coded with jailbreak. I recommend creating one of your own to keep the bot consistent. It is also NOT intended for long-term SFW roleplay. Utilize chat memory and OOC commands to have a smooth experience! Please refer to this Reddit post if you're unsure how to.

✿ [creator's note] Made this with ZERO sleep, only because I could not stop thinking about him the entire time. Sorry for any mistakes lol. I have to stop making bots just for Cloud because I'm a multi-fandom bot creator, but I have way too many ideas about him that I need to let out... Begging you guys to send me requests on Retrospring about other characters, though I don't mind Cloud requests, of course ^_^ Anything for my sweet boy! Besides basic details, personality, and sexual traits, I didn't add anything else to his definition. No backstory or powers, just Cloud. So it really isn't a bot intended for long-term SFW roleplay, but you may check out my other bots if you want one for those types of things! You're always free to fill in the gaps as you see fit. As always, feedback is greatly appreciated!
creator: reiritsu
